channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prep roundup: Cornerstone Christian, Liberty, Riordan, Mitty, De La Salle, Valley Christian, among Tuesday’s winners
item.description: Prep roundup: Cornerstone Christian sweeps boys and girls games against Head-Royce, Acalanes girls continue to roll, Riordan routs another WCAL rival and more
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Mike McCarthy withdraws from Saints' coaching search and won't coach in 2025, AP source says
item.description: Mike McCarthy has decided against coaching in 2025, removing himself as a candidate to fill the NFL’s last remaining head coaching vacancy with the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors. For his grit and his drive. For doing all the little things many never saw.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alyssa Thomas heading to Mercury from Sun in trade, AP source says
item.description: The Phoenix Mercury were finalizing a deal to acquire Alyssa Thomas from the Connecticut Sun, a person familiar with the trade told The Associated Press on Tuesday night. The Sun also will send Ty Harris to Phoenix, while Connecticut will receive Natasha Cloud, Rebecca Allen and the No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: Scottie Scheffler figures the injury to his hand that kept him out of golf for a month could have been worse.
item.dc:creator: Doug Ferguson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator, according to a person familiar with the situation.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Neymar returns to Brazilian club Santos after termination of contract in Saudi Arabia
item.description: RIO DE JANEIRO (AP) — Neymar has agreed to return to Santos nearly 12 years after he left the Brazilian team, club president Marcelo Teixeira said Tuesday. The Brazil striker confirmed earlier that his contract with Saudi Arabian club Al-Hilal had been terminated by mutual consent.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Padres' late owner's brother puts blame for not signing star pitcher Roki Sasaki on lawsuit by owner's widow
item.description: San Diego Padres owners claim that a lawsuit filed by the late owner's wife impacted their ability to sign star pitcher Roki Sasaki in free agency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-Bears coach Eberflus returns to Cowboys to run the defense; Sorensen takes over special teams
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Cowboys hired former Chicago Bears coach Matt Eberflus as defensive coordinator Tuesday for his second stint on the Dallas staff.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andy Reid and Nick Sirianni have this in common: Eagles fans wanted them fired
item.description: "Fire Andy" chants echoed throughout the stands in Philadelphia during Andy Reid’s final season coaching the Eagles in 2012. Nick Sirianni heard many of those same fans yelling “Fire Nick” in Week 6. Now, the two head coaches are facing off in the Super Bowl for the second time in three years.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lamar Jackson, Josh Allen and Jayden Daniels to skip Pro Bowl Games
item.description: Baltimore's Lamar Jackson, Buffalo's Josh Allen and Washington's Jayden Daniels won't be participating in the Pro Bowl Games this week. The NFL announced final rosters Tuesday that didn't include any of those quarterbacks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX jersey colors announced for Chiefs-Eagles rematch
item.description: The jersey colors the Kansas City Chiefs and Philadelphia Eagles will wear for the Super Bowl have been revealed. The Eagles chose to wear "midnight green" again.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nobody is running away with NBA rookie of the year race yet, which is a change from most years
item.description: At this point, there is no Victor Wembanyama in this season's NBA rookie class. There is no Paolo Banchero. And there's no Luka Doncic, Ja Morant, Karl-Anthony Towns, Damian Lillard, Kyrie Irving, Blake Griffin, Brandon Roy, Derrick Rose or Chris Paul, either.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Bears coach Eberflus returns to Cowboys to run the defense; Sorensen takes over special teams
item.description: The Cowboys are hiring former Chicago Bears coach Matt Eberflus as defensive coordinator for his second stint on the Dallas staff.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Falcons’ Jeff Ulbrich says lack of truth-telling, delegation led to failed stint as Jets interim head coach
item.description: Former New York Jets defensive coordinator Jeff Ulbrich said Monday that his failure to delegate and a seemingly lack of honesty led to his struggles as the Jets interim head coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Watch: Inside how Super Bowl footballs are made
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Butler suspended for the 3rd time this month by the Miami Heat as trade deadline looms
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler was back from suspension. Again. And then Butler got suspended by the Miami Heat. Again. Butler has been suspended for the third time this month by the Heat, this one starting basically just as the second one was ending.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lady Vols coach Kim Caldwell returns 1 week after giving birth to son
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee coach Kim Caldwell returned to the sideline a week after giving birth to a son and was greeted with a standing ovation from a crowd of 12,033 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anthony Davis scores 42 points, grabs 23 rebounds as Lakers top Hornets 112-107 for 4th straight win
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Anthony Davis had 42 points and 23 rebounds, and the Los Angeles Lakers used a huge first quarter from the All-Star center to build a 23-point lead before beating the Charlotte Hornets 112-107 on Monday night for their fourth straight win.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
